source.authority: Ghana Revenue Authority and Parliament of Ghana
source.scope: Official-source-backed Ghana resident income tax through the unambiguous 25% band and the full generally applicable non-resident 25% schedule, with contradictory upper resident bands rejected.

GH.notes: Resident monthly and annual chargeable income through the unambiguous 25% band; higher resident income fails closed because the official 30% band and 35% threshold overlap. Non-residents use the generally applicable 25% rate.

register.coverageSummary: Resident chargeable income through GHS 19,896.67 monthly or GHS 238,760 annually, plus the full generally applicable non-resident 25% schedule.
